product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp: bind --help, auth status --help, sync --help, create-issue --help, auth status, and doctor runtime behavior
internal/cli: command registration/help output for bind, auth status, sync, create-issue, and doctor
internal/credential: no-token auth status source reporting
internal/doctor: no-repo-bound diagnostic and binding remediation
evidence_type: offline local command validation using a freshly built gitcode-mcp CLI, isolated temporary cache/config directories, help stdout comparison, auth status no-token stdout, doctor no-binding stdout, go test ./..., and git diff --check
freshness: current working tree production docs and freshly built cmd/gitcode-mcp binary; deterministic offline validation with GITCODE_TOKEN unset for no-token scenarios; no live network or device validation
mocks_used: none; validation runs the real compiled CLI against local temporary filesystem state only
